description: Pre-registration for density-aware pair selection experiment. Frozen before data collection. Modifications after registration are prohibited.
background: run_021 found H_ceiling supported: log_min_density is the strongest predictor of investigability (|r|=0.461). C1-C2 gap concentrated in low-density group (0.197). H_density_select tests whether density filtering eliminates this gap.

H_density_select.claim: Introducing density-aware cross-domain pair selection makes C2 investigability statistically equivalent to C1 investigability
H_density_select.rationale: run_021 shows C2's investigability deficit is driven by low-density pairs. Filtering them out should restore parity.

H_matched_parity.claim: Under matched density conditions, C2_density_aware and C1 show no statistically significant difference in investigability
H_matched_parity.rationale: run_021 matched comparison showed gap=0 in den_mid and den_high cells. C2_density_aware removes den_low pairs, so all comparisons should be in high-density regime.

C2_density_aware.description: Density-aware multi-op pipeline (align->compose_cross_domain, then min_density >= threshold filter)
C2_density_aware.pipeline: align(bio_kg, chem_kg, threshold=0.3) -> compose_cross_domain(combined_kg, max_depth=5) -> filter(min_density >= threshold) -> top_70_by_path_length

C1_baseline.description: Single-op compose on biology KG only — reused from run_018

C_rand_v2.description: Truly random cross-domain baseline — reused from run_018

SC_ds_primary.name: C2_density_aware parity with C1
SC_ds_primary.description: C2_density_aware investigability is statistically equivalent to C1 investigability

SC_ds_improvement.name: C2_density_aware improves over C2_baseline
SC_ds_improvement.description: C2_density_aware investigability exceeds run_018 C2 rate (0.914)
